screen_reader_issues.description: No <main> landmark found. Screen reader users cannot quickly navigate to primary content.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Wrap the primary content area in a <main> element.

screen_reader_issues.description: No <nav> landmark found. Navigation regions should be identified for assistive technology.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Wrap navigation links in a <nav> element with aria-label if multiple navs exist.

functional_issues.description: Page uses animations but does not respect prefers-reduced-motion media query.
functional_issues.recommendation: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; } }
